items.body_excerpt:
Tarris Reed Jr. loved the "physicality" he saw in the Finals.

"Guys were in the paint, hacking, bruising, all that. I got the body for it and I embrace the physical game.That's a huge part of who I am and how I play."

items.title: Some scattered 2026 NBA Draft notes:
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Some scattered 2026 NBA Draft notes:

🏀Only four NCAA Early Entry Candidates did not get drafted in the first round: I. Evans, M. Thomas, B. Tucker, H. Veesaar
🏀Six seniors were drafted in the first-round: Y. Lendeborg, B. Stirtz, Z. Ejiofor, T. Reed Jr, J. Jefferson, A. Karaban

1/2
